summary: Full QA Audit of iMOs Relationship Management System - REPORT ONLY. Tested login, navigation, all tabs, More page sections, admin pages, and settings. Found 12+ pages returning 404 errors.

404_pages.issue: Team Chat page returns 404 - This is linked from More menu
Redirects to marketing page instead of actual leaderboard

working_pages: /more - More tab with all sections expandable
/my-account - My Account with Quick Actions works
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /team-chat route - currently returns 404, Team Chat is accessible at /team instead
HIGH: Fix /imos/notifications route - Notifications page returns 404
MEDIUM: Fix /imos/leaderboard - Currently redirects to marketing page instead of actual leaderboard
MEDIUM: Create missing pages for 10+ 404 routes listed in 404_pages
LOW: Verify all More menu links match their actual routes
critical_code_review_comments: Multiple pages linked from More menu return 404 - routes not defined in Expo router
Team tab in bottom navigation points to /team but some links point to /team-chat which doesn't exist
Leaderboard route shows marketing page instead of actual user leaderboard data
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was a full QA audit - REPORT ONLY. Found 12+ pages returning 404 errors. Backend APIs all work correctly. The Team Chat is accessible at /team not /team-chat. Many settings pages under More menu have missing routes. Login and core features (Inbox, Contacts, Dialer, Tasks, More) all work. Admin panel fully functional.
